description_long: This is a pair of low-top canvas sneakers in a vibrant red color with white rubber toe caps and soles. The shoes feature white stitching along the seams and white laces threaded through metal eyelets in a standard criss-cross pattern. The sidewalls of the soles are white with a thin black stripe running along the edge, and the heel area displays the text 'ALL STAR' in black on a white background. The interior appears to be lined with a beige or tan material, and the shoes have a classic, casual design reminiscent of Converse Chuck Taylor All Stars. The overall appearance is clean, crisp, and well-constructed, with no visible signs of wear or damage.
description: A pair of red low-top canvas sneakers with white laces, rubber toe caps, and 'ALL STAR' branding on the heel. The shoes are clean, vibrant, and feature classic styling with white stitching and black-striped soles.
description_view_0: Front view showing the white rubber toe caps, white laces, and the symmetrical shape of both shoes.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the red canvas upper, white stitching, and the black stripe along the white rubber sole.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the 'ALL STAR' branding on the heel and the open, low-cut design of the shoes.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the red canvas, white stitching, and the profile of the white rubber sole.
attribute_logo: Black 'ALL STAR' text on white patch at the heel; black star between words.
